headline: Historical Systems Enters Definitive Merger Agreement with Stonebridge Partners
body: Shareholders will receive $6.50 per share in cash. The all-cash transaction is expected to close in the third quarter. Following closing, Historical Systems will become privately held.

headline: Old Rumor Corp. Shares Rise on Take Private Speculation
body: The company did not confirm any transaction. Reports described the matter as rumor and speculation after a non-binding proposal from an investment firm.
notes: Rumor should not become an important alert.

headline: Capital Raise Corp. Announces Public Offering
body: The company announced a registered direct offering and warned that the transaction may result in dilution to existing shareholders.
